2606.09076.caption_zh: （a）文本—图像对齐（b）真实感（c）美学（d）物理合理性图5：使用Z-Reward进行基于强化学习的文本到图像优化期间的验证奖励轨迹。我们报告了四个优化维度（文本—图像对齐、真实感、美学和物理合理性）在1万次强化学习迭代中的奖励分数趋势。所有分数均按五级量规尺度报告，分数越高越好。

2606.09076.caption: (a)GRPO HPA(b)GRPO Margin HPA(c)GDSO HPA(d)GDSO Margin HPAFigure 4:Effect of reward computation from score distributions.We compare human preference accuracy and margin human preference accuracy when rewards are computed from decoded score distributions instead of parsed score text. “Parsing Text” denotes computing the reward from the score parsed from the generated text, rather than from the expectation of the score distribution.
2606.09076.caption_zh: (a)GRPO HPA (b)GRPO Margin HPA (c)GDSO HPA (d)GDSO Margin HPA 图4：基于分数分布的奖励计算效果。我们比较了当奖励从解码的分数分布（而非从解析的得分文本）计算时，人类偏好准确率（HPA）与边际人类偏好准确率（Margin HPA）的情况。“解析文本”表示奖励是从生成文本中解析出的分数计算得出，而非从分数分布的期望值计算。

2606.11683.caption: Figure 3:Overview of the Geometry-to-Video Pipeline.It consists of two stages: (1)Trajectory Planning, where we predict a 3D point cloud via VGGT and design a scene-spanningOblique Sweeppath; and (2)View Rendering, where we synthesize temporally coherent video framesVe​x​oV_{exo}via point-based rasterization.
2606.11683.caption_zh: 图 3：几何到视频流程概述。该流程包含两个阶段：(1) 轨迹规划，通过 VGGT 预测三维点云并设计跨场景的倾斜扫描路径；(2) 视图渲染，通过基于点的光栅化合成具有时间一致性的外视视频帧 Vₑₓₒ。

2606.11683.caption: Figure 2:Overview of the ReRe Framework.Given an egocentric video, our method operates in two phases: (1)Reason Phase, where the MLLM forms an initial hypothesis from the original view; and (2)Re-reason Phase, where the model verifies its hypothesis against a synthesized allocentric view (Ve​x​oV_{exo}). TheGeometry-to-Videopipeline generatesVe​x​oV_{exo}via trajectory planning and view rendering to provide complementary geometric evidence.
2606.11683.caption_zh: 图 2：ReRe 框架概览。给定一段以自我为中心的视频，我们的方法分为两个阶段运行：(1) 推理阶段，MLLM 从原始视角形成初始假设；(2) 再推理阶段，模型根据合成的客体中心视角（V_exo）验证其假设。几何到视频流程通过轨迹规划和视图渲染生成 V_exo，以提供互补的几何证据。

2606.11683.caption: Figure 4:Visual Comparison of Allocentric Trajectory Designs.(a)Oblique Sweep(Ours) follows a diagonal path through the scene center with an elevated tilt. (b)Mid-level Traversemoves horizontally along the diameter at a fixed elevation. (c)Bird’s-eye Orbitcircles the scene center from a top-down perspective.
2606.11683.caption_zh: 图4：以自我为中心与以场景为中心轨迹设计的视觉对比。(a)斜向扫描（本方法）以抬升的倾斜角沿对角线穿过场景中心。(b)中层穿行沿直径在固定高度水平移动。(c)鸟瞰环绕从俯视视角绕场景中心旋转。

2601.05212.caption: Figure 1:FlowLet overview.(a) Training:a preprocessed 3D MRI volumexxis mapped to the invertible 3D Haar wavelet domain via the DWT, producing eight subbands (LLL + seven detail bands). The conditional 3D U-Netvθ​(xt,t,c)v_{\theta}(x_{t},t,c)(conditioncc: age) is trained to predict the FM velocity field in wavelet space along the interpolation pathxtx_{t}between noisex0x_{0}and datax1x_{1}.(b) Inference:starting from Gaussian noisex0x_{0}in wavelet space and a target conditioncc, samples are generated by integrating the learned ODE∂txt=vθ​(xt,t,c)\partial_{t}x_{t}=v_{\theta}(x_{t},t,c)with a small number of solver steps; the final wavelet coefficients are mapped back to voxel space with the inverse DWT (IDWT) to obtain the synthesized MRI.
2601.05212.caption_zh: 图1：FlowLet 方法概览。(a) 训练阶段：预处理后的三维 MRI 体数据 x 通过离散小波变换 (DWT) 映射到可逆的三维 Haar 小波域，生成八个子带（LLL 低频带及七个细节子带）。条件三维 U-Net v_θ(x_t, t, c)（条件 c：年龄）被训练用于预测小波空间中沿噪声 x_0 与数据 x_1 之间插值路径 x_t 上的 FM 速度场。(b) 推断阶段：从小波空间的高斯噪声 x_0 和目标条件 c 出发，通过对学习到的常微分方程 ∂_t x_t = v_θ(x_t, t, c) 进行少量求解器步长的积分来生成样本；最终的小波系数通过逆离散小波变换 (IDWT) 映射回体素空间，得到合成的 MRI 图像。

2601.05212.caption: Figure 6:Qualitative comparison of FlowLet flow matching formulation across different ODE step counts. Each column shows axial, coronal, and sagittal views for a given method and step count. All samples share the same noise seed and age condition, yielding anatomically consistent outputs with similar structural compartments across flow formulations.
2601.05212.caption_zh: 图6：不同ODE步数下FlowLet流匹配公式的定性对比。每列展示给定方法与步数对应的轴向、冠状面和矢状面视图。所有样本共享相同的噪声种子与年龄条件，从而在流公式间产生解剖结构一致、具有相似解剖分区的输出。

2601.05212.caption: Figure 12:Fixed-seed age-conditioning trajectory generated with FlowLet-RFM. Each column corresponds to a different target age, while the seed is kept fixed across the full sequence. Axial, coronal, and sagittal views are shown for multiple ages.
2601.05212.caption_zh: 图12：基于FlowLet-RFM生成的固定种子年龄条件变化轨迹。每列对应不同的目标年龄，而种子在整个序列中保持不变。图中展示了多个年龄的轴向、冠状面和矢状面视图。

2606.11289.caption: Figure 4:High-level illustration of our final i1 model. Rather than introducing major new network modules,i1combines carefully selected modeling and data design choices into a simple and strong text-to-image model.
2606.11289.caption_zh: 图4：最终i1模型的高级示意图。i1并未引入主要的新网络模块，而是将精心挑选的建模与数据设计方案整合为一个简洁而强大的文生图模型。

2606.11289.caption: Figure 5:High-level illustration of our baseline for controlled experiments. We build a standard cross-attention architecture on top of LightningDiT(yao2025reconstruction)and add QK-norm for training stability. We also include long skip connections(bao2023all), an underused design choice that we revisit in Section4.2and find helpful for performance.
2606.11289.caption_zh: 图 5：本文为受控实验所构建基线模型的高层架构示意图。我们在 LightningDiT（yao2025reconstruction）基础上构建了一个标准的交叉注意力架构，并添加了 QK 归一化以提升训练稳定性。同时，我们引入了长跳跃连接（bao2023all）——这一未被充分利用的设计选择，将在第 4.2 节中重新探讨并证实其对性能的积极作用。

2606.11289.caption: Figure 1:We investigate the design space of text-to-image diffusion models to understand how modeling and data choices affect model capabilities. This exploration culminates ini1, a 3B-parameter model that performs competitively with leading models at 1024-resolution, as measured by the average percentage score across GenEval, DPG-Bench, PRISM, CVTG-2K, and LongText-Bench. We open-source our model, code, and data to support future research.
2606.11289.caption_zh: 图1：我们探究了文生图扩散模型的设计空间，以理解建模与数据选择如何影响模型能力。此项探索最终催生了i1模型——一个拥有30亿参数的模型，其在GenEval、DPG-Bench、PRISM、CVTG-2K和LongText-Bench上的平均百分比得分显示，其1024分辨率生成能力可与主流模型竞争。我们开源了模型、代码及数据以支持未来研究。
